title: TTRP Plushy Pack | FenrisLoxias
description:
REQUIRES VARIANTS-CIT MOD!!!

A plushy pack of known members of Crystal Trash (Formerly Forntreats)!

It also contains known members of TTRP!

Based on the TallTales Roleplay server!
body:
There is a variety of plushies that you can receive by stopping at Crystal Trash or finding FenrisLoxias and his managers on the server!

Retextured blocks that add cute models into the game! Changes the textures of items/blocks into popular or fun characters from the TTRP server! 

[The included Plushies in Season 5]![Season 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40dccbe2ddd32d9a4f82dd72224a929cb79e04bc.png)
